novel_contribution.name: CAETS
novel_contribution.description: Rolling 30-day beta of traditional asset returns on lagged PM probability changes. Predicts forward VIX moves with peak t-stat 3.8 at horizon h=3.
novel_contribution.formula: CAETS(asset, event, t) = β̂ from rolling OLS: R_asset(t+k) ~ ΔP_event(t)
